name: analysis_report
description: Analysis and report generation workflow. Query → validate → generate → record.

nodes.description: Read SCHEMA_{db}.md to confirm table/column names before writing SQL. If missing, run: python shared/tools/db_schema.py generate <db_path>
Execute analysis queries against SQLite database (must use schema from load_schema step)
Cross-validate query results against domain rules. Read checklist, apply each check, report results in checklist_responses.

nodes.delegate_hint: Use report-builder agent for Office document generation (Excel/Word/PPT via MCP tools)

nodes.description: Record report output path in project_state.md
